name: aztec-private-voting
description: Private ballot infrastructure for DAOs - React components + Aztec Noir contracts

scripts.build:contracts: cd contracts && nargo compile && mkdir -p ../demo/public && cp target/private_voting-PrivateVoting.json ../demo/public/private_voting-PrivateVoting.json
scripts.build:baby-proof: cd baby-proof && nargo compile && mkdir -p ../demo/public && cp target/baby_proof.json ../demo/public/baby_proof.json
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @aztec-private-voting/react && npm run typecheck -w demo
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @aztec-private-voting/react && npm run lint -w demo
